prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is E-103 Overcurrent device selection & coordination within 2.1 Electrical. The relevant subcategory is 2.1.1 Power Distribution. The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors NEC 240, 210.8, 210.12, 110.14(C) termination temp ratings. title: T2 E-103 Measurement & estimation
